headline: Union Pacific Corp (UNP)-Norfolk: This Rival Seeks to Scuttle Merger
summary: Union Pacific Corp (NYSE:UNP) is one of the best large cap stocks to buy in 2026 according to billionaire Dan Loeb. This railroad stock has gained roughly 20% over the past six months, and Street forecasts show it has more room to rise. Union Pacific Corp (NYSE:UNP) and Norfolk Southern Corp (NYSE:NSC) want to merge, […]
